title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 26 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 26 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 26 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/04/2022
CFR Qingdao, USD/dry tonne DCE iron ore futures stop falling and rebounds，the main contract closed 809，an decrease of 2.53%throughout the day; the quotation in the morning was increased by 5 yuan/mt over yesterday. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand. today's overall market transaction significantly improved.
